DRAFT BATTLE

One Piece TCG · Build your crew · Conquer all

⚙️ Game Mechanics

🎯 Draft Phase

⏱️
8 seconds per pick — auto-picks if time runs out
🃏
5 random cards per role, equal chance for every card
⚓
Captain & Vice-Captain: Leader cards only
⚡
Other 4 roles: Characters + Leaders pool
🤖
CPU picks randomly from the top 2 highest power cards

⚔️ Role Bonuses

⚓ Captain +10% Power 🗡️ Vice-Captain +5% Power 🛡️ Tank: +10% Power → team HP (≥5,000 power cards only) 💚 Healer: 0.1% Power healed / sec (≥4,500 power cards only) ⚡ Support A — no bonus 🌊 Support B — no bonus
❤️
All cards start with 1,000 HP + Tank bonus
💥
Damage = 8% of effective Power / sec
🤝
Captain & Vice-Captain gain +3% Power per teammate sharing the same crew/type

🏆 Points & Rarity

⚓ Captain 100pts 🗡️ Vice 90pts 🛡️ Tank 80pts 💚 Healer 70pts ⚡ Sup A 60pts 🌊 Sup B 60pts
✨
+150 bonus pts to team with highest total rarity score — no points if tied
Rarity (least → most rare)
C› UC› R› SR› L› SP› PR› SCR› TR
C=Common · UC=Uncommon · R=Rare · SR=Super Rare · L=Leader · SP=Special · PR=Promo · SCR=Secret Rare · TR=Treasure Rare
